description: detect CPU/GPU/memory/disk/OS and emit a JSON resource report with strategic recommendations (read-only)
rules: read-only — only probes system state, never mutates anything
single detection pass writes one report: .claude_resources.json under record_store
GPU probe shells out to nvidia-smi / rocm-smi / sysctl + system_profiler when present; absent tools degrade to empty GPU lists
requires the psutil Python package for CPU/memory/disk; if psutil is missing the porter still emits a non-empty report
usage: Optionally set PROBE_PATH (dir whose disk space is measured; defaults to RECORD_STORE). Output: .claude_resources.json.
limitation: Snapshot only — memory/disk figures change constantly. GPU detection depends on vendor CLIs being on PATH. CPU/memory/disk detail needs psutil installed.
